title: The Komedia Fringe Comedy Showcase
description: A showcase of the best new comedians performing at the 2026 Brighton Fringe. Come see the next generation of the most creative voices in comedy. Now in its FINAL year! SELL-OUT Brighton Fringe 2022-2025. FEATURING: Zoe Cousin – BBC New Comedy Award-nominated character comedy Gabriel Featherstone – Wildly imaginative absurdist stand-up Alice Ella –Social media’s surreal siren of musical comedy Anand Sankar – Unhinged character comedy whirlwind Plus a selection of fantastic acts from across the festival. This showcase is the perfect introduction to the very best new comedians at the Fringe. Hosted by BAFTA-Award winning comedian Luke Rollason (star of Disney+ sitcom Extraordinary) The Luke Rollason Memorial Bursary is a fund set up by the (alive) comedian to support new comedians making unconventional work.

venue.name: Komedia Studio
venue.address: 44-47 Gardner Street, 44-46 Gardner Street, East Sussex

reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - Brighton May 25, 2024 Updated: August 2, 2025 No Comments 4
reviews.excerpt: A wonderfully surreal deep dive into the stranger side of alternative comedy. Luke Rollason seems like a lovely chap. Now a proper telly star in his own right, courtesy of Disney+ show Extraordinary (he plays Jizzlord), he hasn’t forgotten his roots.
